title: The Battle of Badr (624 CE / 2 AH)
description: The decisive clash between the early Muslim community and the pagan Quraish forces, fulfilling early Meccan prophecies of victory for the truth.
scholarlyInterpretation: Viewed by scholars as a major historical milestone confirming the truth of divine revelation.

title: The Mongol Sack of Baghdad (1258 CE / 656 AH)
description: The destruction of the Abbasid Caliphate capital by Hulagu Khan, fulfilling Prophetic narrations regarding the invasion of wide-faced, small-eyed tribes from the East.
scholarlyInterpretation: Imam Ibn Kathir and Al-Qurtubi documented this as a major fulfillment of Hadith regarding Turks/Mongols.

title: The Great Fire of the Hijaz (1256 CE / 654 AH)
description: A massive volcanic eruption near Medina that illuminated the night sky across Arabia such that the necks of camels in Busra (Syria) were visible.
scholarlyInterpretation: Explicitly cited by Imam An-Nawawi as fulfilling Sahih Bukhari Hadith #7118.
references: Sharh Sahih Muslim by Imam An-Nawawi

title: The Crusades & Liberation of Jerusalem (1096–1291 CE)
description: Centuries of military conflict over the Levant culminating in Salahuddin al-Ayyubi liberating Jerusalem in 1187 CE (583 AH).
scholarlyInterpretation: Classic demonstration of historical cycles of trials (fitan) and divine assistance.
references: Al-Kamil fi al-Tarikh by Ibn al-Athir

title: World War I & World War II (1914–1945)
description: Global industrialized warfare resulting in tens of millions of casualties and the dissolution of traditional imperial caliphates.
scholarlyInterpretation: Scholars note the fulfillment of widespread loss of life ('Harj') predicted in end-times narrations.
references: Ashrat as-Sa'ah by Dr. Yusuf al-Wabil

title: Creation of Israel & Displacement of Palestine (1948)
description: Establishment of the state of Israel in Palestine leading to mass displacement and ongoing conflict over Al-Quds.
scholarlyInterpretation: Scholars link the concentration of populations in the Levant to end-times gatherings.

title: COVID-19 Global Pandemic (2019–2023)
description: Worldwide health emergency resulting in global lockdowns, border closures, and unprecedented suspension of public gatherings.
scholarlyInterpretation: Observed as a manifestation of novel disease outbreaks (Waj') warned against in Prophetic texts.

title: Turkey-Syria Earthquakes (2023)
description: Devastating 7.8 magnitude earthquake striking southern Turkey and northern Syria causing widespread destruction.
scholarlyInterpretation: Reminds humanity of the frequency of earthquakes (Zalazil) preceding the Hour.
